message:
refactor(engine): replace hardcoded mock inventory test counts with property assertions

Test assertions for the source-derived mock inventory were brittle
because they checked exact counts (must_fix >= 5, test_only >= 13,
affected_files >= 14) that broke whenever cfg(test) gating or
mock usage changed. Replace with property-based assertions:
- total_occurrences > 0 (scanner is working)
- test_only_count > 0 (some test-only usage exists)
- test_only items are AcceptableTestOnly + inside_cfg_test + NoAction
- must_fix items are not inside cfg(test)
- MockContext kind count > 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
